title: Aggregate validation results, compute all SHA256 hashes, and produce provenance report for MeshCore native targets
description: Collect all build logs, test outputs, commands, exit statuses from previous subtasks. Compute SHA256 hashes for all key artifacts and logs. Generate consolidated validation report excluding .35.6 scopes. Ensure clean EBS usage.
close_reason: Aggregated results from native_sim and native_posix MeshCore tests; computed SHA256 for all key files (adapter.c, ble_meshcore.c, vectors); generated validation-provenance-2auf.59.4.1.3.3.log; cleaned twister-out.2 for EBS; tests passed; committed and pushed
